# Professional Task Suite Fixtures

These fixtures support graphless main-agent professional task evaluation.

- `buggy_counter.py` is intentionally wrong so the agent can diagnose and repair it inside sandbox.
- `failing_sixty_turn_summary.json` is a compact failure-report fixture.
- `ops_incident_snapshot.json` is a local operations incident fixture.
- `node_status_filter_contract.json` is a compact end-to-end feature contract.
